title: hypericum reptans subsp. reptans
intro: Hypericum reptans subsp. reptans, also known as Creeping St. John's Wort, is a flowering perennial plant in the St. John's Wort family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial activities, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Creeping St. John's Wort include its potential to reduce anxiety and depression, promote wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Creeping St. John's Wort is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
